fields.name: boardPointIataCode
fields.description: 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport. e.g. LHR

fields.name: offPointIataCode
fields.description: 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport. e.g. BKK

fields.name: scheduledLegDuration
fields.description: duration of the leg following standard [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations)
